_metadata.description: Azure resource move support matrix - subscription to subscription. Values verified against official Microsoft documentation.

microsoft.aad/domainservices.remarks: Azure AD Domain Services cannot be moved.

microsoft.compute/availabilitysets.remarks: Move all VMs in the set together. Use Azure Resource Mover.

microsoft.compute/disks.remarks: Managed disks can be moved. Use Azure Resource Mover.

microsoft.compute/galleries.remarks: Shared Image Galleries cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.compute/galleries/images.remarks: Gallery images cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.compute/galleries/images/versi.remarks: Gallery image versions cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.compute/hostgroups.remarks: Dedicated host groups cannot be moved.

microsoft.compute/restorepointcollection.remarks: Restore point collections cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.compute/snapshots.remarks: Full snapshots: Yes. Incremental snapshots: No. Cannot move incremental snapshots across subscriptions.

microsoft.compute/sshpublickeys.remarks: SSH public keys cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.compute/virtualmachines.remarks: Validate dependent NIC, disk, and public IP before move. VMs in availability sets must be moved together. Use Azure Resource Mover.

microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extens.remarks: VM extensions move with the VM.

microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescaleset.remarks: Move with associated load balancer and public IP.

microsoft.compute/cloudservices.remarks: Cloud Services (extended support) - see move guidance for classic deployment model.

microsoft.network/applicationgateways.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.network/applicationgatewayweba.remarks: WAF policies cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/azurefirewalls.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.network/bastionhosts.remarks: Bastion hosts cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/ddosprotectionplans.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate and reassociate.

microsoft.network/expressroutecircuits.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.network/firewallpolicies.remarks: Firewall policies cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/frontdoors.remarks: Front Door (classic) cannot be moved. Migrate to Standard/Premium (under Microsoft.Cdn) first.

microsoft.network/ipgroups.remarks: IP groups cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/loadbalancers.remarks: Basic SKU: Yes. Standard SKU: No for subscription move. All backend pool resources must be moved for Standard.

microsoft.network/localnetworkgateways.remarks: Local network gateways can be moved across subscriptions. Verify VPN connection settings after move.

microsoft.network/natgateways.remarks: NAT Gateways cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/networkinterfaces.remarks: Move with the associated VM. Use Azure Resource Mover.

microsoft.network/networkwatchers.remarks: Network Watcher must exist per region per subscription. Delete and recreate.

microsoft.network/privatednszones.remarks: VNet links must be deleted before move and recreated after.

microsoft.network/privateendpoints.remarks: Yes for supported private-link resource types. No for all other private-link resources. Verify your specific private endpoint type.

microsoft.network/publicipaddresses.remarks: See Networking move guidance. IP addresses are not retained when using Azure Resource Mover.

microsoft.network/virtualhubs.remarks: Virtual Hubs cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/virtualnetworkgateways.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.network/virtualnetworks.remarks: All dependent resources (subnets, peerings) must be reviewed. VNet peerings must be deleted and recreated.

microsoft.network/virtualwans.remarks: Virtual WANs cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/vpngateways.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.storage/storageaccounts.remarks: Both source and target subscriptions must be registered with the same resource provider.

microsoft.classicstorage/storageaccounts.remarks: Classic storage accounts cannot be moved across subscriptions. Migrate to ARM first.

microsoft.sql/servers.remarks: Server and all its databases must be moved together.

microsoft.sql/servers/databases.remarks: Must be moved with the parent server.

microsoft.sql/servers/elasticpools.remarks: Must be moved with the parent server.

microsoft.sql/managedinstances.remarks: SQL Managed Instances cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.sql/managedinstances/databases.remarks: Cannot be moved. Child of managed instance.

microsoft.sql/servers/failovergroups.remarks: Cannot be moved. Delete and recreate after moving server.

microsoft.dbformysql/servers.remarks: Use cross-region read replica to move an existing server.

microsoft.dbforpostgresql/servers.remarks: Use cross-region read replica to move an existing server.

microsoft.dbformariadb/servers.remarks: Use cross-region read replica to move an existing server.

microsoft.documentdb/databaseaccounts.remarks: Cosmos DB accounts using the RU architecture can be moved. vCore-based (mongoClusters, cassandraClusters) cannot.

microsoft.documentdb/mongoclusters.remarks: MongoDB vCore clusters cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.documentdb/cassandraclusters.remarks: Cassandra clusters cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.cache/redis.remarks: If configured with a virtual network, the instance cannot be moved to a different subscription.

microsoft.web/sites.remarks: App Service apps move with the App Service plan. Custom domains with SSL may need re-binding. See App Service move guidance.

microsoft.web/sites/slots.remarks: Deployment slots move with the app.

microsoft.web/serverfarms.remarks: All apps in the plan must be moved together.

microsoft.web/certificates.remarks: App Service certificates can be moved but may need re-binding. Managed certificates cannot be moved.

microsoft.web/hostingenvironments.remarks: App Service Environments cannot be moved.

microsoft.containerservice/managedcluste.remarks: AKS clusters cannot be moved across subscriptions. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.containerregistry/registries.remarks: Target subscription must have the resource provider registered.

microsoft.containerinstance/containergro.remarks: Container instances cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.app/containerapps.remarks: Container Apps not explicitly listed in official move support docs. Verify manually on Microsoft Learn.

microsoft.app/managedenvironments.remarks: Container Apps managed environments can be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.keyvault/vaults.remarks: Key Vault must have soft-delete enabled. Key Vaults used to encrypt disks cannot be moved. Update access policies after move.

microsoft.managedidentity/userassignedid.remarks: User-assigned managed identities cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.authorization/roleassignments.remarks: Role assignments are not resources that move. Recreate in target scope.

microsoft.authorization/policydefinition.remarks: Custom policies must be recreated in target subscription.

microsoft.authorization/policyassignment.remarks: Policy assignments must be recreated in target subscription.

microsoft.authorization/locks.remarks: Resource locks must be removed before move and recreated after.

microsoft.insights/metricalerts.remarks: Metric alert rules cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.insights/activitylogalerts.remarks: Activity log alerts cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.insights/scheduledqueryrules.remarks: Scheduled query rules (log alert rules) can be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.insights/components.remarks: Application Insights components can be moved. Moving changes the resource ID which affects data access.

microsoft.insights/datacollectionrules.remarks: Data collection rules cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces.remarks: Workspaces linked to automation accounts must be unlinked first. Solutions linked to the workspace must be moved separately. Check subscription quotas.

microsoft.operationalinsights/clusters.remarks: Log Analytics clusters cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.operationsmanagement/solutions.remarks: Move with the associated Log Analytics workspace.

microsoft.automation/automationaccounts.remarks: Runbooks must exist in the same resource group. Managed identities move automatically with the account.

microsoft.logic/integrationserviceenviro.remarks: Integration Service Environments cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.eventhub/clusters.remarks: Dedicated Event Hub clusters can be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts.remarks: Includes Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Services, and all Cognitive Services resources.

microsoft.machinelearningservices/worksp.remarks: Azure ML workspaces cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.machinelearning/workspaces.remarks: Classic Machine Learning workspaces can be moved.

microsoft.search/searchservices.remarks: Cannot move several Search resources from different regions in one operation.

microsoft.apimanagement/service.remarks: API Management set to Consumption SKU cannot be moved.

microsoft.cdn/profiles.remarks: Azure Front Door Standard/Premium objects appear under Microsoft.Cdn provider.

microsoft.batch/batchaccounts.remarks: Cannot be moved directly from one region to another. Use template export/deploy.

microsoft.recoveryservices/vaults.remarks: Disable backup items or stop replication first. Cross-region move via Azure Backup is not supported.

microsoft.migrate/projects.remarks: Azure Migrate projects cannot be moved.

microsoft.datamigration/services.remarks: Database Migration Service cannot be moved.

microsoft.databricks/workspaces.remarks: Databricks workspaces cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.synapse/workspaces.remarks: Synapse workspaces cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.hdinsight/clusters.remarks: Move other resources (e.g. storage account) first, then move HDInsight cluster on its own. Cannot move networking resources across subscriptions.

microsoft.streamanalytics/streamingjobs.remarks: Job must be stopped before moving. Cannot be in running state.

microsoft.maps/accounts.remarks: Azure Maps is a geospatial service.

microsoft.servicefabric/managedclusters.remarks: Managed clusters cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.resources/resourcegroups.remarks: Resource groups themselves cannot be moved. Move the resources inside them.

microsoft.classiccompute/virtualmachines.remarks: Classic VMs can be moved across subscriptions. See classic deployment model move guidance.

microsoft.classicnetwork/virtualnetworks.remarks: Classic virtual networks cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.maintenance/maintenanceconfigu.remarks: Maintenance configurations cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.netapp/netappaccounts.remarks: Azure NetApp Files cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.appplatform/spring.remarks: Azure Spring Apps can be moved.

microsoft.communication/communicationser.remarks: Resources with attached phone numbers cannot be moved to subscriptions in different data locations.

microsoft.digitaltwins/digitaltwinsinsta.remarks: Digital Twins instances cannot be moved. Recreate resources in new region.

microsoft.devtestlab/labs.remarks: DevTest Labs cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.saas/applications.remarks: SaaS applications cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.alertsmanagement/actionrules.remarks: Cannot be moved. Recreate in target subscription.

microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters.remarks: Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters cannot be moved.

microsoft.redhatopenshift/openshiftclust.remarks: ARO clusters cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.sqlvirtualmachine/sqlvirtualma.remarks: Delete SQL IaaS Agent extension, move the VM, then re-register.

microsoft.azureactivedirectory/b2ctenant.remarks: B2C tenants cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.azurestackhci/clusters.remarks: Azure Stack HCI clusters cannot be moved.

microsoft.blockchain/blockchainmembers.remarks: Blockchain network cannot have nodes in different regions.

microsoft.machinelearning/webservices.remarks: Classic ML web services cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.network/vpnsites.remarks: Virtual WAN VPN sites cannot be moved.

microsoft.solutions/applicationdefinitio.remarks: Managed application definitions cannot be moved.

microsoft.mobilenetwork/mobilenetworks.remarks: Private mobile networks cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.storagecache/caches.remarks: HPC Cache cannot be moved across subscriptions.

microsoft.sql/servers/jobaccounts.remarks: Must be moved with the parent server.

microsoft.sql/servers/jobagents.remarks: Must be moved with the parent server.

microsoft.sql/servers/databases/backuplo.remarks: Must be moved with the parent server.
